item.title: Novenas you can start today - 13 April
item.description:
Blessed Adalberto Of Ostrevant
Blessed Francis Of Fabriano
Blessed Stephen Of Nagyvarad
Martyrs Of Persia
Pope Saint Agapitus I
Pope Saint Caius I
Pope Saint Soter
Saint Abel Mcaedh
Saint Aceptismas Of Hnaita
Saint Altfried Of Munster
Saint Apelles Of Smyrna
Saint Arwald
Saint Epipodius Of Lyon
Saint Euflamia
Saint Helimenas
Saint Joseph Of Persia
Saint Leonidas Of Alexandria
Saint Leo Of Sens
Saint Lucius Of Laodicea
Saint Maryahb
Saint Opportuna Of Montreuil
Saint Senorina
Saint Theodore Of Sykeon
Saint Virginio

Feast Day: 22 April
Start Date: 13 April
End Date: 21 April
